sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂי שׂה

Transliteration: śeh śêy

Phonetic: seh

BDB Definition:

  1. one of a flock, lamb, sheep, goat, young sheep, young goat
    1. sheep, goat
    2. flock (collective)

Origin: probably from H7582 through the idea of pushing out to graze

TWOT entry: 2237

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
